Job Title: DISR Multiple Contract Roles – Dev, Tester, BA, PM, Architect, Storage Eng
Ad Text:
About the Opportunities

We are working with a Federal Government department delivering a range of ICT initiatives across digital, infrastructure and cloud platforms. These are long-term contract opportunities (12 months + extensions) supporting major programs across multiple teams.

Multiple roles are available across different domains, supporting both new and existing ICT initiatives within the CIO Division.

Roles Available

LH-06073 – .NET Software Engineers (Developers)

.NET Core / .NET Framework, ASP.NET Web APIs, Azure API Management, Angular or React, xUnit/nUnit, Selenium/Playwright, secure coding (ISM)

Azure Logic Apps, Azure SQL, Azure Service Bus, Azure DevOps (CI/CD), Dynamics 365 integration, Visual Studio, legacy modernisation

Agile delivery, DevOps practices, API integration, cloud-native patterns, technical documentation, stakeholder communication, cross-team collaboration

LH-06074 – Automation Testers

Test strategy, test planning, test case design, Azure DevOps, defect tracking, test execution, UAT coordination

Automation frameworks, Selenium/Playwright, integration testing, web application testing, accessibility testing (WCAG), test artefacts, quality assurance

Agile testing, stakeholder engagement, cross-functional collaboration, prioritisation, reporting, documentation, continuous improvement

LH-06075 – Business Analysts

Process modelling, data analysis, requirements gathering, user journeys, stakeholder workshops, use cases, business scenarios

User stories, acceptance criteria, Agile delivery, Azure DevOps tracking, documentation, reporting, solution evaluation

Communication, presentation, stakeholder engagement, technical translation, process mapping, change management, collaboration

LH-06076 – Cloud Solutions Architects

Azure architecture (HLD/DLD), Azure DevOps pipelines, Infrastructure as Code, virtual networking, hybrid cloud, ingress patterns, cloud-native design

Azure services, DevOps, CI/CD, integration patterns, API design, enterprise architecture alignment, stakeholder engagement

Security (ISM, OWASP, Essential 8), solution governance, design documentation, Agile delivery, AI/ML exposure, data platforms, technical leadership

LH-06077 – CRM Developers (Dynamics 365 / Power Platform)

Dynamics 365 CE, Dataverse, PowerApps, Power Automate, plugins/workflows, dashboards/reports, CRM security model

Azure DevOps CI/CD, Power Platform ALM, solution layering, environment strategy, automation pipelines, governance, monitoring

Integration (Dataverse API, Azure Service Bus, REST), Azure SQL, Microsoft 365, C#/.NET extensions, data migration, DevSecOps practices

LH-06079 – Project Managers (EL1 level)

Project planning, governance, risk management, stakeholder engagement, reporting, Agile/Hybrid delivery, program coordination

Resource management, financial management, procurement, quality management, project tools, delivery frameworks, executive communication

Cross-functional leadership, negotiation, issue resolution, performance management, program oversight, team leadership, delivery assurance

LH-06080 – Software Engineers (Developers)

.NET (8/10), REST APIs, OpenAPI/Swagger, OAuth2/OIDC, React, automated testing (unit/integration/UI), secure SDLC

Azure App Services, Azure Functions, Azure SQL, Service Bus/Event Grid, API Management, Key Vault, App Insights

CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, event-driven architecture, system integration (CRM/identity), observability, performance tuning, technical documentation

LH-06082 – Front-End Developers / UI Designers

HTML, CSS, JavaScript, ReactJS, Angular, responsive UI, component-based development

UX/UI design, wireframes, prototypes, Figma/Adobe XD/Axure, usability testing, user flows, interaction design

Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), design systems, usability improvements, stakeholder communication, front-end optimisation, cross-team collaboration, testing

LH-06129 – Senior Storage Infrastructure Engineers

HPE 3PAR/Primera/Alletra, NetApp E-Series, Dell Data Domain, Brocade switches, SANnav, Scality Artesca, enterprise storage

Storage configuration, SAN management, backup (Veeam), virtualisation, performance tuning, troubleshooting, infrastructure operations

Design/build documentation, automation, data centre operations, high availability, capacity planning, mentoring, stakeholder communication

Key Details

Location: Canberra (onsite preferred; interstate/remote/flexible arrangements may be considered for highly experienced candidates)

Contract: 12 months + 2 x 12 month extensions

Hours: Up to 40 hours per week

Start: Mid-2026 (most roles July start)

Security Clearance: Baseline required at commencement

Location & Flexibility

While these roles are primarily Canberra-based due to the nature of the work, we encourage strong and highly experienced candidates from other states to apply.

Flexible or remote arrangements may be considered on a case-by-case basis, depending on the role and business requirements.

What We’re Looking For

Experience in Federal Government or similar environments

Strong technical capability in your area of expertise

Ability to work in Agile, multi-disciplinary teams

Good communication and stakeholder engagement skills

Important Notes

These are genuine opportunities (not market testing) with multiple hires expected

Candidates must provide a one-page pitch addressing selection criteria (APS-style)

Most roles require Baseline clearance at commencement

How to Apply

Please send:

Updated CV

Cover letter clearly stating at the beginning the role title(s) and/or RFQ ID(s) you are applying for

Availability and expected rate
